description_long: This lamppost features a tall, slender, and slightly tapered pole with a rounded, bulbous base for stability. The upper section of the post curves gracefully into a decorative spiral, from which a single lantern-style lamp head is suspended. The lamp head is hexagonal with vertical glass panels and a dark metallic frame, evoking a classic Victorian or old-world aesthetic. The scrollwork at the top adds an ornate touch, making it suitable for parks, historic districts, or upscale urban environments. The surface appears to be made of painted or powder-coated metal, likely iron or steel, with a matte to semi-gloss finish. No signage or additional attachments are visible, and the overall design emphasizes both function and decorative appeal.
description: A tall, ornate lamppost with a spiral scrollwork top and a hanging lantern-style lamp head, finished in dark metal. The design is classic and decorative, suitable for elegant urban or park settings.
description_view_0: The lamppost is seen from an angle highlighting the spiral scrollwork and the hanging lantern, with the rounded base clearly visible.
description_view_1: A direct front view showing the lantern head centered and the pole extending vertically, with the spiral less visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side angle, again emphasizing the spiral scrollwork and lantern, mirroring view 0 but from the other side.
description_view_3: A direct rear view with the lantern head centered and the pole vertical, similar to view 1 but from the back.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Hexagonal lantern with vertical glass panels and a dark metallic frame, classic Victorian style.
